news.title:
Aptus Value Housing Finance moves from attractive to fair valuation grade.
Shift reflects evolving market views and relative price changes in housing finance.
news.summary:
Aptus Value Housing Finance moves from attractive to fair valuation grade.
Shift reflects evolving market views and relative price changes in housing finance.

news.title:
Aptus Value Housing Finance board to meet on May 6, 2026, to approve Q4 and FY26 results.
Board to consider interim dividend, fix record date, and approve debt securities issuance.
news.summary:
Aptus Value Housing Finance board to meet on May 6, 2026, to approve Q4 and FY26 results.
Board to consider interim dividend, fix record date, and approve debt securities issuance.

news.title:
Aptus Finance confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 42.8L on NCDs due April 6, 2026.
No delays or non-payments reported; ISIN: INE04MH07059, issue size: 7,500 NCDs.
news.summary:
Aptus Finance confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 42.8L on NCDs due April 6, 2026.
No delays or non-payments reported; ISIN: INE04MH07059, issue size: 7,500 NCDs.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.
Jefferies sees 74% upside for Aavas Financiers, targets Rs 1,875; Morgan Stanley gives cautious view, prefers Aptus and Home First Finance.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.
Jefferies sees 74% upside for Aavas Financiers, targets Rs 1,875; Morgan Stanley gives cautious view, prefers Aptus and Home First Finance.

news.title:
Aptus Finance India Pvt Ltd confirms timely servicing of NCD interest/principal dues.
Interest of Rs.42.99L and redemption of Rs.4.68Cr completed on March 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Aptus Finance India Pvt Ltd confirms timely servicing of NCD interest/principal dues.
Interest of Rs.42.99L and redemption of Rs.4.68Cr completed on March 30, 2026.

news.title:
Aptus Finance India Pvt Ltd reports timely interest/principal payments for NCDs as per SEBI Regulation 57.
Details include Rs.30.9L interest paid on Feb 27, 2026, and Rs.3.1Cr redeemed with Rs.37.5Cr outstanding.
news.summary:
Aptus Finance India Pvt Ltd reports timely interest/principal payments for NCDs as per SEBI Regulation 57.
Details include Rs.30.9L interest paid on Feb 27, 2026, and Rs.3.1Cr redeemed with Rs.37.5Cr outstanding.

news.title:
Aptus Value Housing Finance will meet investors/analysts on Feb 16, 2026, in Mumbai.
Discussions will be based on publicly available info; no UPSI will be shared.
news.summary:

news.title:
Morgan Stanley rates Aptus Value Housing Finance as Overweight.
It sets a target price of 420 for the stock.

Morgan Stanley rates Aptus Value Housing Finance as Overweight.

news.title: Aptus Value Housing Finance India reported Q3 net profit of ₹2.36B, up from ₹1.9B YoY.
news.summary: Aptus Value Housing Finance India reported Q3 net profit of ₹2.36B, up from ₹1.9B YoY.

news.title:
Aptus Value Housing's stock rose 6% last week, recovering from a 12% yearly loss. Institutions hold 44% of shares.
Insiders own 22% of Aptus Value Housing, signaling alignment with shareholders. Top 6 shareholders control over 50% of shares.
news.summary:
Aptus Value Housing's stock rose 6% last week, recovering from a 12% yearly loss. Institutions hold 44% of shares.
Insiders own 22% of Aptus Value Housing, signaling alignment with shareholders. Top 6 shareholders control over 50% of shares.
